image:image.image:caption: GBP/JPY Crosses and Pair Detail panel in the terminal, showing price change, carry, ADR, GBP rate, volatility, GBP and JPY COT positioning, retail long/short split, and the D1 candlestick chart
CFTC COT — Leveraged Funds panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing net percent positioning by currency with week-over-week change
CB Rates & Bias panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing rate, retrospective trend, OIS-implied probability, and next meeting date per currency

Carry Monitor panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing long and short swap points, annualized carry percent, 30-day volatility, Sharpe ratio, and long/short signal per pair

Economic Calendar panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing today's scheduled releases by currency with actual, forecast, and previous values sourced from MT5's own calendar feed
Composite Score panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing the blended score bar and CB bias label per currency
Economic Surprise Index panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing the beat/miss bar per currency over a rolling 90-day window
Market Sessions panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing open/closed status and progress bars for Sydney, Tokyo, London, and New York
Currency Strength panel rendered natively inside the MT5 Expert Advisor canvas, showing a multi-line strength index for the majors over a selectable timeframe
MetaTrader 5 (MT5) trading terminal interface screenshot — Global Investing FX Expert Advisor canvas overlay with live prices, COT positioning, CB rates, and economic calendar
Global Investing web-based FX terminal dashboard, browser view with FX pairs, economic calendar, currency strength, and AI market narrative panels
Derivatives section — 25-delta risk reversal term structure
CFTC COT — Leveraged Funds positioning panel in the Global Investing web terminal, showing weekly net contracts and week-over-week momentum by currency
CB Rate Expectations panel in the Global Investing web terminal, showing OIS-implied cut/hold/hike probabilities for all 10 G10 central banks
Economic Surprise Index (ESI) panel in the Global Investing web terminal, showing decay-weighted actual-vs-forecast scores by G10 currency
Risk Monitor panel in the Global Investing web terminal, showing VIX, MOVE index, EUR/USD 30-day historical volatility, market regime status, and a table of cross-asset stress signals
Key Correlations table showing rolling 60-day Pearson correlation between FX pairs and reference assets, with a vs-norm z-score column flagging stretched or broken correlations
25-Delta Risk Reversal term structure table showing RR values across 1W, 1M, 3M, 6M, and 1Y tenors for six major pairs, with a Skew column summarizing put or call skew
Carry Trade Ranking panel in the Global Investing web terminal, showing G10 real carry annualized ranking by currency pair

Currency Strength Heatmap modal in the Global Investing web terminal, CSI tab, showing accumulated percent-return lines for all 10 G10 currencies with composite score, 1-week strength, rank, pairs won, and strongest/weakest crosses

Alerts & Market Signals panel showing AI-generated entries combining COT positioning, OIS-implied central bank bias, carry, and options skew, each with a priority dot, timestamp, title, and supporting data chips
News Feed panel with currency filter pills (All, USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, CAD, CHF, NZD, NOK, SEK) and a list of FX-relevant headlines with source, timestamp, and summary
Global Investing FX Terminal on mobile, top of the scrollable single-column view, showing FX Pairs — Majors table, Currency Strength Heatmap, and Economic Calendar
CSI Currency Strength indicator panel overlay on a USDCAD H1 chart in MetaTrader 5, showing per-currency index and strength bars for USD, JPY, GBP, EUR, CAD, CHF, NZD, AUD
Carry Trade Indicator panel overlay on a USDCAD H1 chart in MetaTrader 5, ranking pairs by annualised swap-implied carry yield with long/short signals
Institutional Risk Manager panel on an MT5 chart, showing risk-per-trade sizing, scaled-exit modules, and live portfolio exposure by currency
Monte Carlo Equity Projection indicator on an MT5 chart, showing a bootstrap-simulated percentile equity cone and a full risk metrics strip

COT detail modal, Overview tab, showing the Positioning Gauge with z-score and percentile, the Long/Short Split, Key Metrics (Net%OI, Week-on-Week Change, Crowd Alignment, Trend Pattern), the Participants breakdown by category, the 52-Week Range, and the 12-Week Net Trend sparkline

COT detail modal, Net Position tab, showing a weekly bar chart of Leveraged Funds net contracts colored teal for net-long and red for net-short, with a daily spot close line chart for the currency pair below it
COT detail modal, Long/Short tab, showing weekly LF longs versus shorts as overlaid line charts in teal and red, with a total LF open interest chart below it

COT detail modal, Participants tab, showing a multi-line chart of LF, Asset Manager, and Dealer net positions over time, a text legend describing each category, and a participant breakdown table with long, short, net, long percent, and week-over-week columns

COT detail modal, History tab, showing a 52-week scrollable table with columns for week, net LF, week-over-week change, longs, shorts, long percent, net percent of open interest, asset manager net, and dealer net

Global Investing FX Terminal full dashboard in split layout mode, showing the three-column layout with left sidebar (FX Liquidity, Crosses, Carry), main area split between chart/FX table/heatmap and cross-asset/risk/rates/COT panels, and right panel (CB Rates, Correlations, Rate Expectations, Economic Surprise Index)
Global Investing FX Terminal on mobile, top of the scrollable single-column view, showing the topbar, AI narrative panel, and price chart
Global Investing FX Terminal on mobile, showing the AI market narrative panel and the price chart panel in the scrollable single-column view
Global Investing FX Terminal on mobile, showing the Cross-Asset panel and Risk Monitor panel in the scrollable single-column view
Topbar navigation, live quote bar, and scrolling news ticker in the Global Investing FX Terminal
Price Chart panel showing EUR/USD in candlestick mode on the D1 timeframe with a 6-month range, EMA 50 and EMA 20 overlays, previous close line, and OHLC header
FX Pairs — Majors table showing live bid/ask, spread, 1-day and 1-week change, 30-day historical volatility, 1M/3M forward rates, and 1M risk reversal for the G10 major pairs
Currency Strength Heatmap showing 10 G10 currencies ranked strongest to weakest by average percentage change across 32 live pairs

Currency Strength detail modal for AUD showing composite strength, 1W strength, rank, pairs won, strongest and weakest vs, the Pair Breakdown tab active, and the full 10-currency ranking by day % and 1W %

FX Liquidity panel showing estimated market liquidity across the 24-hour trading day, with Tokyo, London, and New York session shading, a 30-day average dotted line, and a vertical marker for the current time
Crosses panel listing 23 FX cross pairs grouped by ISO currency hierarchy (EUR, GBP, AUD groups shown) with live price and daily percentage change
Carry Trade Ranking showing the top 10 G10 pair candidates by annualized real carry, with each row's nominal OIS spread and a proportional bar
Economic Calendar panel showing Myfxbook RSS as the source, G10 currency flags, event names, actual vs forecast vs previous values with beat/miss coloring
Pair Detail inline strip for USD/JPY showing price, 1W change, carry, ADR, JPY rate, volatility, COT positioning (leveraged funds and asset managers net), and retail sentiment
Central Bank Rates table showing current policy rates and trend direction for the Fed, ECB, BoE, BoJ, RBA, SNB, BoC, RBNZ, Norges Bank, and Riksbank
Key Correlations table showing rolling 60-day Pearson correlation between FX pairs and reference assets, with a vs-norm z-score column flagging stretched or broken correlations
CB Rate Expectations table showing bank, next meeting date, OIS-implied bias (hold/hike/cut with probability), and implied rate for all eight major central banks
Economic Surprises panel showing a centred bar per G10 currency indicating whether recent macro data beat or missed consensus, with an event count N for each currency
News Feed panel with currency filter pills (All, USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, CAD, CHF, NZD, NOK, SEK) and a list of FX-relevant headlines with source, timestamp, and summary

Alerts & Market Signals panel showing AI-generated entries combining COT positioning, OIS-implied central bank bias, carry, and options skew, each with a priority dot, timestamp, title, and supporting data chips
Alerts popover showing a fired notification, the alert type selector (Price / Level), instrument dropdown, condition and value fields, and an Add button
Implied Forwards table showing spot, 1M/3M/6M/1Y forward rates via Covered Interest Parity, and rate differential for G10 major and Scandinavian pairs
25-Delta Risk Reversal term structure table showing RR values across 1W, 1M, 3M, 6M, and 1Y tenors for six major pairs, with a Skew column summarizing put or call skew
Realized Volatility table showing HV 30d, RR 1M, RR/HV ratio, and trend arrow for six major pairs
ECB Reference Exchange Rates table showing ECB fix, previous fix, change, change percent, and offset from spot for nine EUR-base pairs including EUR/NOK and EUR/SEK

FX OTC Notional Volume table from the DTCC Global Trade Repository, showing notional in billions, trade count, swap/forward/spot breakdown, and percent of total G10 volume per pair with an intensity bar
Economic Surprise Index panel in the Global Investing FX terminal, ranking all 10 G10 currencies by their 90-day surprise index with beat/miss bar chart and event count N
Economic Surprise Index detail modal for USD, showing the 90-day rolling surprise chart, beats/misses/N summary, and the individual event log with actual vs forecast values
Rates & Yield Curve panel, US tab, showing the 3M/2Y/5Y/10Y rate cells, the yield curve chart with all five tenors plotted, and the 2Y-10Y, US-DE, and US-JP spread table
Rates & Yield Curve panel, Spreads tab, showing sovereign 10Y spreads versus the US for DE, GB, JP, AU, CA, NZ, NO, and SE alongside 2Y yields and a curve-slope indicator

US Treasury Yield Curve detail view, showing the 10Y-2Y and 30Y-2Y spread callouts, a larger curve chart with today vs prior close, the full five-tenor table with change in basis points, and the Market Commentary block

Currency Strength Index tab inside the web terminal's Currency Strength Heatmap modal, showing a multi-series chart of cumulative log-returns for all 10 G10 currencies with a ranked legend and CSI Snapshot table
CSI Currency Strength indicator panel overlay on a USDCAD H1 chart in MetaTrader 5, showing per-currency index and strength bars for USD, JPY, GBP, EUR, CAD, CHF, NZD, AUD
